name: atelier-mcp
description: AI architect MCP server — multi-typology houses (tube house, villa, single-storey, garden house, apartment, UK detached) on any lot incl. sloping terrain; pluggable building-standard rule packs (TCVN, UK Approved Documents); standards-checked plans, live two-way browser editor, furnished 3D walkthrough, PDF/DXF/IFC export. Works with any MCP client: Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Claude Desktop, Cursor.
